patches.value: Chisel 本地隧道实验
Chisel Local Tunnel Lab
Chisel HTTP/SSH 隧道的回环监听、普通转发、反向转发、SOCKS 和指纹校验参考，所有端点限定在本地实验服务。
Chisel HTTP-over-SSH tunnel reference for loopback listeners, normal and reverse forwarding, SOCKS, and fingerprint verification with every endpoint restricted to local lab services.

name.zh: 启动回环 Chisel 服务端

description.zh: 只在回环地址启动允许反向转发的实验服务端，记录启动时显示的 SSH 指纹并在测试后终止进程。
description.en: Start a reverse-enabled lab server on loopback only, record the displayed SSH fingerprint, and stop the process after testing.

name.zh: 建立本地普通端口转发
name.en: Create a Local Normal Port Forward

description.zh: 把客户端回环 18080 转发到服务端回环 8080 的固定 marker 服务，不绑定外网接口。
description.en: Forward client loopback port 18080 to a fixed marker service on server loopback port 8080 without binding an external interface.

name.zh: 建立本地反向端口转发
name.en: Create a Local Reverse Port Forward

description.zh: 在服务端回环 18081 建立反向转发到客户端回环 8081 的实验服务，并核对监听地址未扩大。
description.en: Create a reverse forward from server loopback port 18081 to client loopback port 8081 and verify that the listener scope is not widened.

name.zh: 建立回环反向 SOCKS
name.en: Create a Loopback Reverse SOCKS Proxy

description.zh: 仅在服务端回环地址暴露实验 SOCKS5 端口，用固定本地 marker 请求验证后立即停止。
description.en: Expose a lab SOCKS5 port on server loopback only, verify it with one fixed local marker request, and stop it immediately afterward.

name.zh: 核对当前命令参数

description.zh: 查看已安装版本的服务端与客户端参数，避免沿用旧教程中的 `attacker_ip`、过期短选项或默认全接口监听。
description.en: Inspect server and client arguments for the installed version instead of reusing attacker_ip placeholders, stale short options, or default all-interface listeners from old tutorials.

patches.value: 网络转发边界验证
Network Forwarding Boundary Validation
SSH、Socat、ProxyChains 与 Windows PortProxy 的受控网络转发检查，默认使用回环监听和单一 marker 服务。
Controlled forwarding checks for SSH, Socat, ProxyChains, and Windows PortProxy using loopback listeners and one marker service by default.

name.zh: SSH 回环动态代理

description.zh: 在回环地址建立 SOCKS 代理并要求监听失败时退出，测试目标限定为实验跳板机上的 marker 服务。
description.en: Create a loopback SOCKS proxy that exits on listener failure, restricting test destinations to a marker service on the lab jump host.

name.zh: SSH 回环本地转发

description.zh: 把本机回环 18080 映射到实验跳板机回环 8080，不扫描网段或访问未声明目标。
description.en: Map local loopback port 18080 to loopback port 8080 on the lab jump host without scanning networks or contacting undeclared targets.

name.zh: Socat 回环单端口转发

description.zh: 仅在回环地址转发一个实验 TCP 端口，移除原来的 `EXEC:/bin/sh` 子进程路径并在测试后终止 Socat。
description.en: Forward one lab TCP port on loopback only, removing the former EXEC:/bin/sh child-process path and stopping Socat after testing.

name.zh: 查看 Windows PortProxy 规则

description.zh: 只读列出现有 PortProxy 规则并记录监听地址、端口和目标，不新增全接口转发或改动系统网络状态。
description.en: Read existing PortProxy rules and record listener addresses, ports, and destinations without adding all-interface forwards or changing network state.

name.zh: 使用独立 ProxyChains 配置

description.zh: 在工作目录生成一次性 ProxyChains 配置并只请求固定回环 marker，不修改 `/etc/proxychains4.conf` 或扫描网段。
description.en: Create a disposable ProxyChains configuration in the working directory and request one fixed loopback marker without editing /etc/proxychains4.conf or scanning a network.

patches.value: SSH 多跳配置验证
SSH Multi-Hop Configuration Validation
SSH ProxyJump、动态代理和连接复用的配置展开与回环实验参考，用预检替代未受控的多层代理和 Meterpreter 路由。
SSH ProxyJump, dynamic-proxy, and connection-multiplexing validation reference using configuration inspection and loopback labs instead of uncontrolled nested proxies or Meterpreter routing.

name.zh: 展开 ProxyJump 配置

description.zh: 只展开多跳配置并检查最终主机、用户、端口和 ProxyJump 顺序，不建立网络连接。
description.en: Expand the multi-hop configuration and inspect final host, user, port, and ProxyJump order without opening a network connection.

name.zh: 检查动态代理配置

description.zh: 在启动前展开动态代理目标配置，确认解析到专用实验跳板机且监听地址保持回环。
description.en: Expand the dynamic-proxy target configuration before launch and confirm it resolves to the dedicated lab jump host with a loopback listener.

name.zh: 检查 SSH 复用控制连接
name.en: Inspect an SSH Multiplexing Control Connection

description.zh: 查询工作目录内指定 ControlMaster Socket 的状态，不创建持久服务；Socket 不存在时的失败是正常负对照。
description.en: Query the state of a named ControlMaster socket in the working directory without creating persistence, treating a missing socket as an expected negative control.

patches.value: 网络转发工具参数检查
Network Forwarding Tool Argument Inspection
sshuttle、Metasploit SOCKS、rpivot 与 Stowaway 的当前帮助和受控实验入口，默认不启动全流量路由或远程 Agent。
Current help and controlled lab entry points for sshuttle, Metasploit SOCKS, rpivot, and Stowaway without starting full-traffic routing or remote agents by default.

name.zh: 查看 sshuttle 路由参数

description.zh: 查看当前版本的远端、子网、DNS 和 method 参数，明确不使用 `0/0` 全流量路由作为默认示例。
description.en: Inspect remote, subnet, DNS, and method arguments for the installed version while explicitly excluding 0/0 full-traffic routing from the default workflow.

name.zh: 查看 Metasploit 路由帮助

description.zh: 只查看 route 和 SOCKS 模块的当前帮助并退出，不创建 Session、路由或监听器。
description.en: Read current help for route and the SOCKS module and exit without creating sessions, routes, or listeners.

name.zh: 查看 rpivot 服务端与客户端参数
name.en: Inspect rpivot Server and Client Arguments

description.zh: 从受控项目副本查看 rpivot 两端参数，确认监听、认证和代理端口后再设计本地实验。
description.en: Inspect both sides of rpivot from a controlled project copy and review listener, authentication, and proxy ports before designing a local lab.

name.zh: 查看 Stowaway 两端参数

description.zh: 仅查看当前版本管理端和 Agent 参数，不连接远程主机；实验使用回环地址和一次性配置。
description.en: Inspect administrator and agent arguments for the installed version without connecting to a remote host, using loopback and disposable configuration for any later lab.

patches.value: SSH 隧道高级边界配置
Advanced SSH Tunnel Boundary Configuration
SSH ProxyJump、autossh、SOCKS、本地与反向转发的高级配置参考，所有监听显式绑定回环并启用失败退出。
Advanced SSH reference for ProxyJump, autossh, SOCKS, local, and reverse forwards with every listener explicitly bound to loopback and failure-on-forward enabled.

name.zh: 预检多级跳板配置

description.zh: 在连接前展开并核对最终主机、用户、端口和跳板顺序，不把占位域名当作可访问目标。
description.en: Expand and review final host, user, port, and jump order before connecting without treating placeholder hostnames as reachable targets.

name.zh: autossh 回环本地转发

description.zh: 维持单一回环本地转发，使用 SSH keepalive 和失败退出，不安装 systemd 服务或开机持久化。
description.en: Maintain one loopback local forward with SSH keepalives and failure-on-forward without installing a systemd service or boot persistence.

name.zh: SSH 回环 SOCKS5

description.zh: 仅在回环 1080 建立动态代理，使用独立 ProxyChains 配置和固定 marker 请求验证。
description.en: Create a dynamic proxy on loopback port 1080 only and validate it with an isolated ProxyChains configuration and one fixed marker request.

name.zh: SSH 回环反向转发

description.zh: 在实验 Broker 回环地址创建单一反向 SSH 端口，测试结束后终止会话并确认远端监听消失。
description.en: Create one reverse SSH port on lab-broker loopback, then terminate the session and verify that the remote listener disappears.

name.zh: SSH 回环本地转发

description.zh: 把本地回环 18081 映射到实验跳板机回环 8081，保留详细日志并限制为一个服务。
description.en: Map local loopback port 18081 to loopback port 8081 on the lab jump host, retaining verbose logs and limiting the tunnel to one service.

patches.value: Neo-reGeorg 本地兼容性实验
Neo-reGeorg Local Compatibility Lab
Neo-reGeorg 当前参数、服务端夹具生成和回环 SOCKS 兼容性验证参考；生成物只用于本地临时目录且不上传外部站点。

Neo-reGeorg reference for current arguments, server-fixture generation, and loopback SOCKS compatibility, with generated artifacts restricted to a local temporary directory and never uploaded externally.

name.zh: 查看生成与客户端参数

description.zh: 查看当前版本输出目录、Key、监听地址、SOCKS 端口和连接参数，不生成或连接任何远程端点。
description.en: Inspect output-directory, key, listener, SOCKS-port, and connection arguments for the installed version without generating or connecting to a remote endpoint.

name.zh: 生成本地实验服务端夹具

value.command:
work_dir=$(mktemp -d)
python3 neoreg.py generate -k PAYLOADER_LAB_KEY --outdir "$work_dir/neoreg-servers"
find "$work_dir/neoreg-servers" -maxdepth 1 -type f -print | sort
rm -rf "$work_dir"

description.zh: 把服务端兼容性夹具生成到一次性目录，核对文件类型后立即删除，禁止上传到外部 Web 服务。
description.en: Generate server compatibility fixtures in a disposable directory, inspect file types, and delete them immediately without uploading them to an external web service.

name.zh: 回环 Go 服务端与 SOCKS 客户端实验
name.en: Loopback Go Server and SOCKS Client Lab

value.command:
go run ./neoreg-servers/tunnel.go 18000 > ./neoreg-lab.log 2>&1 &
server_pid=$!
trap 'kill "$server_pid" 2>/dev/null' EXIT
python3 neoreg.py -k PAYLOADER_LAB_KEY -u http://127.0.0.1:18000/PAYLOADER_MARKER -l 127.0.0.1 -p 1080

description.zh: 仅在回环启动项目自带 Go 服务端并将 SOCKS 绑定到 127.0.0.1；停止客户端后由 trap 清理服务端进程。
description.en: Start the bundled Go server on loopback only and bind SOCKS to 127.0.0.1, with a trap stopping the server process when the client exits.
